{{Quote|Zayl's abilities at the control of a freighter are impressive, as are her capabilities with a blaster. The fact that she is wanted by the Empire ensures she will not be receiving contracts from the Imperials, and that might be seen as a fact in our favor. However, whatever she and her cousin and the others have planned will surely not be to the benefit of the Alliance, particularly if they plan revenge on Lt. Lochner and his companions.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]]|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Zayl Braith''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], and a member of the [[Granse Confederacy]].

==Biography==
Braith was born in the [[Asamin system/Legends|Asamin system]], child of a prosperous family who traded through the [[Essien Run]], particularly with the Asamin system. Braith was [[Callandri]]'s older cousin, and was physically similar to her.<ref name="AIR" />

Braith made friends with different [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], and she began working with one of them, Captain [[Thi Sawrtin]], in many smuggling runs.<ref name="AIR" />

During a "routine" run through the [[Noonian sector/Legends|Noonian sector]], Sawrtin and Braith found the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]] the ''[[Tory's Catcher]]''. Sawrtin found that Imperial Captain [[Gresia Vleen]] was not a friend of bribes, but he nevertheless tried to discuss with her. Vleen shot Sawrtin, impounded his ship and imprisoned Braith for many weeks before transferring her to [[Rol Two]].<ref name="AIR" />

Braith escaped during the transfer, but she became an Imperial fugitive, on the run since.<ref name="AIR" />

Trying to get money working as a smuggler, she contracted with [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] gangster [[Tiron Til]]. Til was a good manager for Braith, but he eventually decided to deal with some [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] smugglers who wanted to monopolize the spice trade in Asamin. Braith, who still felt loyalty towards her native system, did not want to have anything to do with it, and was expelled from Til's syndicate.<ref name="AIR" />

Braith then met her cousin Callandri, who had became a freelance [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] specialized in [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] bounties. They began a partnership, and both of them worked together in a plot to kill Rebel lieutenant [[Alton Lochner]]. Upon finding him in a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], they entered the bar guns blazing. Unfortunately for them, Lochner had company, [[Adazian Liebke]] and a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] named [[Tirranna]]. Tirranna and Lochner were nevertheless injured; Liebke noticed that Tirranna would not mind tasting the blood of either Callandri or Braith should they find her again.<ref name="AIR" />

Soon afterward, Callandri founded the [[Granse Confederacy]] with some other bounty hunters and Braith. The Granse Confederacy became a threat to the Rebel Alliance, coming to the attention of [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]].<ref name="AIR" />

Rebel Lieutenant Commander [[Zhir-Khan]] wrote an article on the threat posed by Braith. He also saw Braith during a mission on Ord Mantell; fortunately for him, she was alone. Zhir-Khan, wondering why would she have come back after her first attack, assigned [[Shofeld]] to watch her until she left the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="AIR" />
